characterProfile.progressionPath: Stronger boundaries, cleaner positioning, and better outcomes across tension.

intro.title: The Negotiator
intro.introText: You grow by holding clarity under pressure and shaping better outcomes without losing position.
intro.firstFocus: Stabilize tension without losing your boundary, leverage, or clarity.

dossiers.title: Q1 Strategy Review
dossiers.situation: We need to evaluate our current business strategy and identify areas for improvement in the Q1 timeframe.
dossiers.main_goal: Complete comprehensive strategy review and develop actionable roadmap for the next quarter.

dossiers.title: Product Roadmap 2026
dossiers.situation: We have identified several product opportunities but need a structured approach to prioritize and plan development.
dossiers.main_goal: Create a detailed product roadmap for 2026 with clear milestones and resource allocation.

dossiers.title: Team Expansion Plan
dossiers.situation: Current team is at capacity and we need to grow our engineering and product teams to meet business goals.
dossiers.main_goal: Successfully hire 5 new team members within the next 8 weeks.

dossiers.title: Customer Feedback Analysis
dossiers.situation: We received numerous customer inquiries and feedback during our last release cycle.
dossiers.main_goal: Analyze all customer feedback and identify top 5 feature requests.

dossiers.title: Technology Stack Migration
dossiers.situation: Our current stack is becoming difficult to scale and maintain for our growing feature set.
dossiers.main_goal: Develop a comprehensive migration plan to modernize our technology stack.

dossiers.title: Marketing Campaign Q2
dossiers.situation: We are launching a new feature and need a coordinated marketing push to drive adoption.
dossiers.main_goal: Achieve 500 new signups from Q2 marketing campaign.
